benefits.description: No gout flare ups for over 2 years after starting TRT; gout returned within 1 week of stopping TRT and resolved again after restarting

protocol_notes: Had gout for 10 years. Discovered low testosterone was related. Started TRT, no gout flares for 2+ years. Stopped TRT and gout returned within 1 week. Restarted TRT with continued resolution of gout flares.
